headline: Salesforce, Dell Headline Earnings Week Amid Light Economic Calendar

headline: HP Inc. (HPQ) Earnings, Dividends Loom, Shares Soar 15%
summary: HP Inc. (NYSE:HPQ) is one of the 10 Stocks Effortlessly Climbing Double-Digits. HP Inc. extended its winning streak to a 6th straight session on Friday, jumping 15.25 percent to finish at $25.24 apiece, as investors gobbled up shares ahead of next week’s earnings outcome and the cutoff date to qualify for its next dividend payment. […]
